query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflowPathways) as workflowPathways_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM taskDefinitions) as taskDefinitions_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM templateTaskCompletion) as templateTaskCompletion_count;
